problem_text_cn:
一、(22分)

下面3小题中，摩擦力均被略去.

(1)竖直平面内有一固定的直角三角形细管道ABC，直角边AB竖直向下，直角边BC水平朝右.如图1所示，取两个小球，同时从A端静止释放.球1沿AB下滑，到达B处后速度大小不变，方向自动地改变为沿BC朝右，直到C端；球2沿AC下滑，直到C端.已知球1，2同时到达C端，AB长$L_{AB}=3L_{0}$，试求BC长$L_{BC}$和AC长$L_{AC}$.

(2)将一条边$AB_{1}$的长度等于(1)问所给$L_{AB}$，另一条边$AB_{2}$的长度等于(1)问所得$L_{BC}$的长方形闭合细管道$AB_{1}CB_{2}$，如图2所示悬挂在竖直平面内，上端点A和下端点C固定，对角线AC处于竖直方位.t=0时刻，将球1，2同时从A端静止释放.球1沿$AB_{1}C$通道到达C端时刻记为T1，球2沿$AB_{2}C$通道到达C端时刻记为T2，试求$T_{1}:T_{2}$.

(3)将(2)问所得T1，T2中小者记为T0，再将图2中下端C改设为可动端.仍在t=0时刻，将球1，2同时从A端静止释放.补设管道质量均匀分布，球1、2质量同为m.为防止管道可能会绕固定端在竖直平面内摆动，如图3所示，在该竖直面内给C端施的水平外力F，试在$T_{0}\geqslant t\geqslant 0$时间内随时确定F的方向(朝右还是朝左)，并给出F的大小F随时间t变化的函数关系.(球在$B_{1}$或$B_{2}$处运动方向突然改变所经的时间间隔，可用无穷小时段$dt\to 0$来表述.)
problem_text_en:
## 1. (22 points)

In the following three sub‑questions, friction is neglected.

(1) In a vertical plane there is a fixed right‑angled triangular thin pipe ABC, with the right‑angled side AB vertical downward and side BC horizontal to the right. As shown in Figure 1, two balls start simultaneously from rest at A. Ball 1 slides down AB, reaches B, then its direction changes automatically to the right along BC (with unchanged speed) until it reaches C; ball 2 slides directly along AC to C. It is known that the two balls arrive at C at the same instant, and $L_{AB}=3L_{0}$. Find $L_{BC}$ and $L_{AC}$.

(2) Construct a rectangular closed thin pipe $AB_{1}CB_{2}$ where side $AB_{1}$ equals $L_{AB}$ given in (1) and side $AB_{2}$ equals $L_{BC}$ obtained in (1). As shown in Figure 2, the pipe is suspended in a vertical plane, with the upper endpoint A and the lower endpoint C fixed, and the diagonal AC vertical. At $t=0$, release balls 1 and 2 simultaneously from A. Let $T_{1}$ be the time for ball 1 to travel along $AB_{1}C$ to C, and $T_{2}$ the time for ball 2 to travel along $AB_{2}C$ to C. Find the ratio $T_{1}:T_{2}$.

(3) Denote the smaller of $T_{1},T_{2}$ obtained in (2) as $T_{0}$. Now modify Figure 2 so that the lower end C is movable. Still at $t=0$, release balls 1 and 2 simultaneously from A. Assume the pipe has uniformly distributed mass and the two balls have the same mass $m$. To prevent the pipe from swinging in the vertical plane around the fixed end, as shown in Figure 3, apply a horizontal external force $F$ at C in that vertical plane. For $T_{0}\geqslant t\geqslant 0$, determine the direction of $F$ (to the right or to the left) at every instant, and give the functional relation of the magnitude $F$ versus time $t$. (The time interval during which a ball abruptly changes direction at $B_{1}$ or $B_{2}$ can be expressed by an infinitesimal interval $dt\to 0$.)
problem_solution_cn:
【参考解答】
(1)参考题解图1，有
$$
\left.\begin{matrix}L_{AB}=\frac{1}{2}gt_{1}^{2},\\L_{AB}\cdot\cot\phi=(gt_{1})t_{2},\end{matrix}\right\}\Rightarrow 2L_{AB}+L_{AB}\cot\phi=gt_{1}(t_{1}+t_{2}),
$$
$$
\begin{aligned}gt_{1}&=g\sin\phi\cdot(t_{1}+t_{2}),\quad\Rightarrow t_{1}+t_{2}=t_{1}/\sin\phi,\\&\Rightarrow 2L_{AB}+L_{AB}\cot\phi=gt_{1}^{2}/\sin\phi=2L_{AB}/\sin\phi,\\&\Rightarrow 2\sin\phi+\cos\phi=2.\end{aligned}
$$
题解图1可解得
$$
\sin\phi=\frac{3}{5},\cos\phi=\frac{4}{5}.
$$
由$ L_{AB}=3L_{0} $，得
$$
L_{BC}=4L_{0},L_{AC}=5L_{0}.\quad(5分)
$$
(2)参考题解图2.

T1的计算:

将球1从A到B1所经时间记为t11，到达B1的速度大小记为v10，有
$$
3L_{0}=\frac{1}{2}g\sin\phi t_{11}^{2},\quad\Rightarrow t_{11}=\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}
$$
$$
v_{10}=g\sin\phi\cdot t_{11}=\frac{3}{5}\sqrt{10gL_{0}}.
$$
将球1从B1到C所经时间记为t12，有
$$
4L_{0}=v_{10}t_{12}+\frac{1}{2}g\cos\phi\cdot t_{12}^{2}=\frac{3}{5}\sqrt{10gL_{0}}t_{12}+\frac{2}{5}gt_{12}^{2},
$$
取其解为
$$
t_{12}=\frac{1}{2}\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}},
$$
合成得
$$
T_{1}=t_{11}+t_{12}=\frac{3}{2}\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}.\quad(4分)
$$
T2的计算:

将球2从A到B2所经时间记为t21，到达B2的速度大小记为v20，有
$$
4L_{0}=\frac{1}{2}g\cos\phi\cdot t_{21}^{2},\quad\Rightarrow t_{21}=\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}=t_{11},
$$
$$
v_{20}=g\cos\phi\cdot t_{21}=\frac{4}{5}\sqrt{10gL_{0}},
$$
将球2从$ B_{2} $到C所经时间记为$ t_{22} $,有
$$
3L_{0}=v_{20}t_{22}+\frac{1}{2}g\sin\phi\cdot t_{22}^{2}=\frac{4}{5}\sqrt{10gL_{0}}\cdot t_{22}+\frac{3}{10}g\cdot t_{22}^{2},
$$
取其解为
$$
t_{22}=\frac{1}{3} \sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}},
$$
合成得
$$
T_{2}=t_{21}+t_{22}=\frac{4}{3}\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}.
$$
(4分)

本问所求答案便为
$$
T_{1}:T_{2}=9:8.
$$
(3)由(2)问解答可知
$$
T_{0}=T_{2}=\frac{4}{3}\sqrt{\frac{L_{0}}{g}},
$$
球1、2于
$$
t_{11}=t_{21}=\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}\overset{\text{令}}{=} t_{1}
$$
同时分别到达$ B_{1} $,$ B_{2} $,据此,将本问讨论的全时间段分为三段:
$$
t_{1}-\frac{d t}{2}>t\geqslant 0;\quad t_{1}+\frac{d t}{2}\geqslant t\geqslant t_{1}-\frac{d t}{2};\quad T_{0}\geqslant t>t_{1}+\frac{d t}{2}.
$$
$ t_{1}-\frac{d t}{2}>t\geqslant 0 $时间段内，F的求解:

此时间段内，t时刻球1、2所在位置到竖直线AC的水平距离分别为
$$
x_{1}=(\frac{1}{2}g\sin\phi\cdot t^{2})\cos\phi,\quad x_{2}=(\frac{1}{2}g\cos\phi\cdot t^{2})\cdot\sin\phi,
$$
即有$ x_{1}=x_{2} $.重力$ m_{1}g=mg $,$ m_{2}g=mg $相对A点力矩之和为零，故有解
$$
F=0,t_{1}-\frac{d t}{2}>t\geqslant 0.
$$
(3分)

$$ t_{1}+\frac{d t}{2}\geqslant t\geqslant t_{1}-\frac{d t}{2} $$时间段内，F的求解:

在上一时间段内，球1、2相对A点的角动量均为零.球1、2分别到达$ B_{1} $,$ B_{2} $前后瞬间，在极短的时间段dt内，由于速度方向的改变，使得系统相对A点发生的角动量变化量为
$$
\Delta L:\begin{cases}\text{方向:水平朝里},\\\text{大小:}\Delta L=4L_{0}mv_{20}-3L_{0}mv_{10}=\frac{7}{5}\sqrt{10}mL_{0}\sqrt{gL_{0}}.\end{cases}
$$
计算中利用了(2)问所得$ v_{10} $,$ v_{20} $值.为在dt时间内产生此△L，需要在C端施加平均水平力
$$
F:\begin{cases}\text{方向:水平朝左},\\\text{大小:}F=\frac{\Delta L}{dt}/5L_{0}=\frac{7}{25}\sqrt{10}m\sqrt{gL_{0}}/dt\to\infty\text{(实为足够大).}\end{cases}
$$
$ T_{0}\geqslant t>t_{1}+\frac{d t}{2} $时间段内，F的求解:

参考题解图3，本时间段内，球1、2水平朝着AC线的加速度分量分别为
$$
a_{1x}=g\sin\phi\cos\phi,\quad a_{2x}=g\cos\phi\sin\phi
$$
即相同.t时刻重力力矩之和为
$$
\Delta M: \begin{cases} \text{方向: 水平朝外}, \\ \text{大小: }\Delta M=mgx_{1}-mgx_{2}, \end{cases}
$$
$$
x_{1}=\frac{12}{5} L_{0}-\left[v_{10} \sin \phi \cdot(t-t_{1})+\frac{1}{2} \times \frac{12}{25} g(t-t_{1})^{2}\right],
$$
$$
x_{2}=\frac{12}{5} L_{0}-\left[v_{20} \cos \phi \cdot(t-t_{1})+\frac{1}{2} \times \frac{12}{25} g(t-t_{1})^{2}\right],
$$
$$
x_{1}-x_{2}=(v_{20} \cos \phi-v_{10} \sin \phi)(t-t_{1})=\frac{7}{25} \sqrt{10 g L_{0}}(t-t_{1}).
$$
计算中已直接将$ \left[t-(t_{1}+\frac{d t}{2})\right]_{dt\to 0} $写为$ (t-t_{1}) $.为平衡此力矩，要求
$$
F: \begin{cases} \text{方向: 水平朝左}, \\ \text{大小: } F=\Delta M / 5 L_{0}=\frac{7}{125} \sqrt{10} m g \sqrt{\frac{g}{L_{0}}}(t-t_{1}). \end{cases}
$$
(4分)

综上所述，有
$$
\left\{\begin{array}{l}{{F=0,\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}-\frac{d t}{2}\geq 0,}}\\{{F\left\{\begin{array}{l}{{\text{方向: 水平朝左},}}\\{{\text{大小: }}F=\frac{7}{25}\sqrt{10}m\sqrt{gL_{0}} /dt\to\infty,\sqrt{10L_{0}/g}+\frac{d t}{2}\geqslant t\geqslant\sqrt{10L_{0}/g}-\frac{d t}{2},}}\\{{\text{方向: 水平朝左},}}\\{{F\left\{\begin{array}{l}{{\text{大小: }}F=\frac{7}{125}\sqrt{10}mg\sqrt{\frac{g}{L_{0}}}(t-\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}),\frac{4}{3}\sqrt{10L_{0}/g}\geqslant t>\sqrt{10L_{0}/g}+\frac{d t}{2},}}\end{array}\right.}\end{array}\right.}
$$
最后一个F表达式中，已将$ \left[t-(\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}})+\frac{d t}{2}\right]_{dt\to 0} $直接写为$ (t-\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}) $.
problem_solution_en:
[Reference solution]
(1) Referring to solution diagram 1,
$$
\begin{cases}
L_{AB} = \frac12 g t_1^2, \\
L_{AB}\cot\phi = (g t_1)t_2,
\end{cases}
\;\Rightarrow\; 2L_{AB}+L_{AB}\cot\phi = g t_1(t_1+t_2),
$$
$$
\begin{aligned}
g t_1 &= g\sin\phi\,(t_1+t_2) \;\Rightarrow\; t_1+t_2 = t_1/\sin\phi, \\
&\;\Rightarrow\; 2L_{AB}+L_{AB}\cot\phi = g t_1^{2}/\sin\phi = 2L_{AB}/\sin\phi, \\
&\;\Rightarrow\; 2\sin\phi+\cos\phi = 2.
\end{aligned}
$$
From solution diagram 1 one obtains
$$
\sin\phi = \frac35,\quad \cos\phi = \frac45.
$$
With $L_{AB}=3L_0$,
$$
L_{BC}=4L_0,\quad L_{AC}=5L_0.\quad(5\,\text{points})
$$
(2) Refer to solution diagram 2.

Calculation of $T_1$:

Denote the time for ball 1 from A to B₁ as $t_{11}$ and its speed at B₁ as $v_{10}$:
$$
3L_0 = \frac12 g\sin\phi\,t_{11}^{2}\;\Rightarrow\;t_{11}= \sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}},
$$
$$
v_{10}=g\sin\phi\,t_{11}=\frac35\sqrt{10gL_0}.
$$
Denote the time from B₁ to C as $t_{12}$:
$$
4L_0 = v_{10}t_{12}+\frac12 g\cos\phi\,t_{12}^{2}=\frac35\sqrt{10gL_0}\,t_{12}+\frac25 g t_{12}^{2},
$$
taking the solution
$$
t_{12}= \frac12\sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}}.
$$
Thus
$$
T_1 = t_{11}+t_{12}= \frac32\sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}}.\quad(4\,\text{points})
$$
Calculation of $T_2$:

Denote the time for ball 2 from A to B₂ as $t_{21}$ and its speed at B₂ as $v_{20}$:
$$
4L_0 = \frac12 g\cos\phi\,t_{21}^{2}\;\Rightarrow\;t_{21}= \sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}}=t_{11},
$$
$$
v_{20}=g\cos\phi\,t_{21}= \frac45\sqrt{10gL_0}.
$$
Denote the time from B₂ to C as $t_{22}$:
$$
3L_0 = v_{20}t_{22}+\frac12 g\sin\phi\,t_{22}^{2}= \frac45\sqrt{10gL_0}\,t_{22}+\frac{3}{10}g t_{22}^{2},
$$
taking the solution
$$
t_{22}= \frac13\sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}}.
$$
Hence
$$
T_2 = t_{21}+t_{22}= \frac43\sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}}.\quad(4\,\text{points})
$$
The required answer is therefore
$$
T_1:T_2 = 9:8.
$$
(3) From part (2) we have
$$
T_0 = T_2 = \frac43\sqrt{\frac{L_0}{g}},
$$
and the two balls reach B₁ and B₂ simultaneously at
$$
t_{11}=t_{21}= \sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}}\equiv t_1.
$$
Accordingly, divide the whole time interval into three stages:
$$
0\le t < t_1-\frac{dt}{2};\qquad
t_1-\frac{dt}{2}\le t \le t_1+\frac{dt}{2};\qquad
t_1+\frac{dt}{2}< t \le T_0.
$$
Stage $0\le t < t_1-\frac{dt}{2}$:

At time $t$, the horizontal distances from the positions of ball 1 and ball 2 to the vertical line AC are respectively
$$
x_1 = \Big(\frac12 g\sin\phi\,t^{2}\Big)\cos\phi,\qquad
x_2 = \Big(\frac12 g\cos\phi\,t^{2}\Big)\sin\phi,
$$
so $x_1=x_2$. The torques of the gravitational forces $m_1g=mg$, $m_2g=mg$ about point A sum to zero, therefore
$$
F = 0,\qquad 0\le t < t_1-\frac{dt}{2}.\quad(3\,\text{points})
$$
Stage $t_1-\frac{dt}{2}\le t \le t_1+\frac{dt}{2}$:

In the previous stage the angular momenta of the two balls about A are both zero. During the infinitesimal interval $dt$ around the instant when the balls reach B₁ and B₂, the change of angular momentum of the system about A due to the abrupt change of velocity directions is
$$
\Delta L:\begin{cases}
\text{direction: into the plane},\\
\text{magnitude: }\Delta L = 4L_0 m v_{20} - 3L_0 m v_{10}
= \frac75\sqrt{10}\,mL_0\sqrt{gL_0}.
\end{cases}
$$
The values of $v_{10},v_{20}$ from part (2) are used. To produce this $\Delta L$ within $dt$, an average horizontal force at C must be applied:
$$
F:\begin{cases}
\text{direction: to the left},\\
\text{magnitude: }F = \frac{\Delta L}{dt}/(5L_0)
= \frac7{25}\sqrt{10}\,m\sqrt{gL_0}/dt\to\infty\;(\text{actually large enough}).
\end{cases}
$$
Stage $t_1+\frac{dt}{2}< t \le T_0$:

Referring to solution diagram 3, during this stage the horizontal accelerations of the two balls toward the line AC are
$$
a_{1x}=g\sin\phi\cos\phi,\qquad a_{2x}=g\cos\phi\sin\phi,
$$
i.e. they are equal. At time $t$ the total torque due to gravity is
$$
\Delta M:\begin{cases}
\text{direction: out of the plane},\\
\text{magnitude: }\Delta M = mg x_1 - mg x_2,
\end{cases}
$$
where
$$
\begin{aligned}
x_1 &= \frac{12}{5}L_0
      -\Big[v_{10}\sin\phi\,(t-t_1)
          +\frac12\cdot\frac{12}{25}g\,(t-t_1)^{2}\Big],\\
x_2 &= \frac{12}{5}L_0
      -\Big[v_{20}\cos\phi\,(t-t_1)
          +\frac12\cdot\frac{12}{25}g\,(t-t_1)^{2}\Big],
\end{aligned}
$$
so
$$
x_1-x_2 = (v_{20}\cos\phi - v_{10}\sin\phi)(t-t_1)
        = \frac7{25}\sqrt{10gL_0}\,(t-t_1).
$$
Here $\big[t-(t_1+\frac{dt}{2})\big]_{dt\to0}$ is directly written as $t-t_1$. To balance this torque one requires
$$
F:\begin{cases}
\text{direction: to the left},\\
\text{magnitude: } F = \Delta M/(5L_0)
                    = \frac7{125}\sqrt{10}\,mg\,\sqrt{\frac{g}{L_0}}\,(t-t_1).
\end{cases}\quad(4\,\text{points})
$$
Summarizing,
$$
\left\{\begin{array}{ll}
F=0, & 0\le t < t_1-\frac{dt}{2},\\
\displaystyle
F\!\left\{\!\begin{array}{l}
\text{direction: to the left},\\[2pt]
\displaystyle
F=\frac7{25}\sqrt{10}\,m\sqrt{gL_0}/dt\to\infty,
\end{array}\right.
& t_1-\frac{dt}{2}\le t \le t_1+\frac{dt}{2},\\
\displaystyle
F\!\left\{\!\begin{array}{l}
\text{direction: to the left},\\[2pt]
\displaystyle
F=\frac7{125}\sqrt{10}\,mg\sqrt{\frac{g}{L_0}}\bigl(t-\sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}}\bigr),
\end{array}\right.
& t_1+\frac{dt}{2}< t \le T_0.
\end{array}\right.
$$
In the last expression, $\big[t-(\sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}})+\frac{dt}{2}\big]_{dt\to0}$ is directly written as $t-\sqrt{10\frac{L_0}{g}}$.
img_cn: 题目问题(1)的示意图。一个固定在竖直平面内的直角三角形细管道ABC，直角边AB竖直向下，长度标记为$L_{AB}=3L_0$；直角边BC水平朝右，长度$L_{BC}$未知。两小球同时从A端静止释放：球1沿AB下滑至B后速度大小不变、方向转为水平向右滑行至C；球2直接沿AC下滑至C。题图标注了重力加速度g的方向。
解题过程示意图1，用于求解问题(1)。图中有一个包含角度φ的直角三角形，标有AB边和BC边，并附有一组方程用于求解角度和边长。
解题过程示意图2及公式推导。几何图中有一个菱形结构，由A、B1、C、B2构成，标明了各边长度关系及角度。下方是复杂的公式推导，包括时间、速度、力矩的计算，以及力F在不同时间段的表达式。
解题过程示意图3及后续推导。展示了力F求解的剩余部分，包括加速度分量、位移差、力矩和力F的分段表达式总结。
img_en: Schematic for part (1) of the problem. A fixed right‑angled triangular thin pipe ABC in a vertical plane; side AB is vertical downward with length $L_{AB}=3L_0$, side BC is horizontal rightward (length $L_{BC}$ unknown). Two balls are released simultaneously from rest at A: ball 1 slides down AB to B, then reverses direction (speed unchanged) to move horizontally right along BC to C; ball 2 slides directly along AC to C. The figure indicates the direction of gravitational acceleration g.
Solution diagram 1, used for solving part (1). It shows a right‑angled triangle with angle φ, sides AB and BC labeled, and a set of equations for solving the angle and side lengths.

Solution diagram 2 and formula derivations. A diamond‑shaped structure formed by points A, B1, C, B2 with side‑length relations and angles indicated. Below are detailed derivations of times, velocities, torques, and the expressions of force F in different time intervals.

Solution diagram 3 and subsequent derivations. Shows the remaining part for determining force F, including acceleration components, displacement differences, torques, and a summary of the piecewise expressions for F.
problem_answer:
(1) $L_{BC}=4L_{0},\quad L_{AC}=5L_{0}$.
(2) $T_{1}:T_{2}=9:8$.
(3) $F=0$ for $0\le t<t_{1}-\frac{dt}{2}$; $F$ (to the left) becomes infinitely large during $t_{1}-\frac{dt}{2}\le t\le t_{1}+\frac{dt}{2}$; for $t_{1}+\frac{dt}{2}<t\le T_{0}$, $F$ (to the left) equals $\dfrac{7}{125}\sqrt{10}\,mg\sqrt{\dfrac{g}{L_{0}}}\bigl(t-\sqrt{10\frac{L_{0}}{g}}\bigr)$.
